doc: JAX-native contracts and adapters for CrafText training.
Environment boundaries that normalize CrafText-family transitions for training.
Pure, JAX-compatible boundary for CrafText and CagedCrafText environments.

name: AdapterContractError
doc: Raised when a vendor environment violates the fixed adapter boundary.

name: CrafTextEnvironment
doc: Minimal CrafText/CagedCrafText reset-step contract used by the adapter.

name: action_count
doc: Return the static discrete action cardinality exposed by this adapter.

name: _fallback_mask
doc: Return the conservative all-actions-available mask with shape ``[A]``.
Typed, pure-JAX registry boundary for interchangeable RL objectives.

name: PpoLossBatch
doc: Flat PPO minibatch with every required old-policy field explicit.

name: AlgorithmSpec
doc: One registry entry of pure functions and its stable public name.

name: get_algorithm
doc: Return one declared algorithm without allowing silent fallbacks.
Pure JAX PPO primitives: discounted returns and generalized advantage estimation.

name: ppo_loss
doc: Return clipped PPO scalar loss and inspectable policy/value/KL metrics.

name: generalized_advantage_estimation
doc: Compute time-major GAE advantages and returns for ``[T, B]`` arrays.

Versioned Orbax persistence for learner state and run provenance.

The module saves trainable JAX PyTrees through Orbax and stores the small,
human-readable compatibility record next to them.  A caller supplies the
``TrainState`` template on restore so executable Flax/Optax functions remain
local code rather than being serialized as opaque Python objects.

name: _load_metadata
doc: Read and validate checkpoint metadata from its adjacent JSON file.

name: _validate_metadata
doc: Reject incompatible checkpoint schemas before they reach a learner.
Versioned, validated configuration contract for reproducible MVP runs.

name: ConfigError
doc: Raised when a run configuration violates the public schema.

name: RunSpec
doc: Run identity and deterministic seed.

name: EnvironmentSpec
doc: Vendor environment selection and fixed rollout dimensions.

name: PromptSpec
doc: Prompt renderer and template selection.

name: PolicySpec
doc: Policy implementation and invalid-action behaviour.

name: ArtifactSpec
doc: Explicit run artifacts retained for replay and documentation.

name: MvpRunConfig
doc: Canonical schema-versioned input for one reproducible MVP run.
Stable, framework-neutral data contracts at the environment/trainer boundary.

name: RolloutBatch
doc: A time-major `[T, B, ...]` rollout plus bootstrap values `[B]`.

name: _shape_of
doc: Read static shape metadata from one NumPy/JAX leaf without materializing it on host.

name: _validate_tree_axes
doc: Ensure every JAX PyTree leaf begins with the contract's declared axes.

name: _register_contract_pytrees
doc: Register public contract dataclasses at their definition boundary for JIT returns.

name: done
doc: Return the JAX-compatible terminal-or-truncated mask with shape ``[T, B]``.
Host-side prompt/LLM/environment orchestration with inspectable replay output.
Explicit, testable conversion of external neural-network weights to JAX PyTrees.
LoRA merge operations with explicit matrix layout and shape checks.

name: _get_path
doc: Read one normalized JAX parameter leaf from a nested tree.

name: _copy_and_set
doc: Return a tree copy with one JAX parameter leaf replaced.

name: merge_lora_adapters
doc: Return a new parameter PyTree with one or more adapters merged, never mutating input.

name: delta
doc: Return the scaled adapter delta in Flax kernel orientation as ``jax.Array``.
Optional safe loader for HuggingFace-style safetensors checkpoints.

name: load_safetensors
doc: Load a safetensors file without supporting pickle-based checkpoint formats.

Framework-neutral checkpoint-to-JAX conversion templates.

Templates make every parameter rename and layout transformation reviewable.  They do not
attempt to infer architecture from an opaque checkpoint: silent guesses are how a model
can appear to load while producing nonsense.

name: ConversionError
doc: The checkpoint and declared model template disagree.

name: TensorRule
doc: One explicit source tensor → JAX PyTree leaf transformation.

name: ModelTemplate
doc: Architecture label and a complete, versionable mapping of its tensors.

name: _set_path
doc: Set one JAX parameter leaf at a validated nested string path.

name: _as_jax_array
doc: Normalize one accepted external tensor into an immutable JAX array leaf.

name: normalize_parameter_tree
doc: Recursively normalize external parameter leaves into a JAX-only parameter tree.

Minimal Flax/Optax actor-critic learner for PPO smoke updates.

This module provides a compact deterministic actor-critic network and
helper functions for initializing a Flax TrainState and applying a single
clipped PPO update. It is built for lightweight smoke tests, example
workflows, and flat feature inputs rather than production-scale RL.
Backend-neutral LLM request/response contracts for prompt-driven actions.
Typed prompt assembly at the CrafText environment-to-model boundary.

name: PromptContractError
doc: Raised when a prompt/action contract is incomplete or ambiguous.

name: RenderedPrompt
doc: Prompt text paired with the exact action space it was rendered against.

name: PromptRenderer
doc: Framework-neutral renderer signature used by model/policy adapters.

name: MegaPromptBackend
doc: Narrow typed view of the vendored MegaPrompts renderer.

name: render
doc: Render one environment-derived prompt and preserve its action catalogue.
Expose source revision information to experiments and the documentation build.

name: git_revision

name: batch_sharding

name: replicated_sharding
doc: Return replicated parameter sharding before model parallelism is enabled.

name: _stack_pytree
